# ScopeStepUp.ParseScopeSet method

Splits a space-delimited scope string into a deduplicated, order-preserving list. Empty/whitespace input yields an empty list.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> ParseScopeSet(string? scope)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| scope | A space-delimited scope string, or `null`. |

## Return Value

The deduplicated scopes.
